title: Build and Ship an Authorized Web Crawler and Accessible Site Auditor in TypeScript 7 and Node 24
description: Advanced TypeScript backend and web learners ready to integrate authorization, web standards, runtime validation, bounded Fetch and Promise ownership, Cheerio, Playwright, accessibility auditing, secure reporting, testing, operations, and recovery into one cumulative crawler product. This original, research-backed path uses repeated retrieval, cumulative artifacts, changed-case labs, stakeholder projects, and a performance exam.
outcomes: Demonstrate a cumulative crawler and accessible site auditor from explicit owner authorization through url and robots policy, bounded fetch, cheerio extraction, fair promise scheduling, durable checkpoints, metadata and accessibility audits, playwright rendering, secure reports, operations, and recovery through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

Demonstrate node 24 and typescript 7 source-to-emission proof; whatwg url and html; rfc 9309; sitemaps; robots-parser conformance adapter; p-limit; cheerio 1.2; playwright 1.61; axe-core 4.12; runtime, security, accessibility, privacy, testing, package, container, and incident evidence through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

Demonstrate original deterministic browser models plus controlled compiler, emitted node, loopback http, dns, filesystem, browser, accessibility, load, package, container, restore, rollback, legal-review, and production transfer gates through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.
Demonstrate five distinct stakeholder projects and a cumulative unfamiliar-site production defense through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.
sharedRequirements: Every activity retrieves stakeholder outcome, owner authorization, revision and runtime, seed and URL identity, origin and path policy, robots decision, response and byte budgets, parser and extraction provenance, frontier and Promise ownership, privacy and accessibility requirement, failure, cleanup, recovery, and controlled transfer limit before adding one boundary.

Browser TypeScript uses original fixed fixtures and pure bounded models only. It does not import Node APIs, contact sites, resolve DNS, read host files, run Cheerio, Playwright, or axe-core, retain credentials, start timers or processes, or claim live accessibility, privacy, legal, load, package, container, or production behavior.

Passing work requires prediction, exact intermediate evidence, runnable accepted and rejected cases, a changed case, a test that catches a deliberate defect, accessible stakeholder output, count reconciliation, and explicit ownership of remaining risk.

competencies.statement: Define stakeholder, affected users, decision, site population, success, failure harm, and observable value before choosing crawler features.
misconceptions: Downloading many pages is itself a valuable stakeholder outcome.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define stakeholder, affected users, decision, site population, success, failure harm, and observable value before choosing crawler features.

competencies.statement: Record who controls each target, permitted identities, paths, methods, times, data uses, and revocation contact before any automated request.
misconceptions: Public reachability grants authorization for unrestricted automation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record who controls each target, permitted identities, paths, methods, times, data uses, and revocation contact before any automated request.

competencies.statement: Separate RFC 9309 crawl preferences from contracts, copyright, privacy, jurisdiction, and qualified legal review.
misconceptions: A robots allow rule is complete legal permission to collect and reuse content.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate RFC 9309 crawl preferences from contracts, copyright, privacy, jurisdiction, and qualified legal review.

competencies.statement: Define necessary fields, purpose, retention, access, correction, deletion, and aggregation risk before collection.

masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define necessary fields, purpose, retention, access, correction, deletion, and aggregation risk before collection.

competencies.statement: Separate pure model, compiler, emitted Node, local HTTP, controlled site, browser, accessibility, security, load, and production claims.

competencies.statement: Admit work through page, origin, byte, memory, browser, file, and report budgets before creating expensive Promises.
misconceptions: Limiting worker count bounds every downstream resource.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Admit work through page, origin, byte, memory, browser, file, and report budgets before creating expensive Promises.

competencies.statement: Classify per-item failure without losing sibling settlements, aggregate cause, or crawl-level stop conditions.
misconceptions: Promise.all is always correct because it fails fast.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Classify per-item failure without losing sibling settlements, aggregate cause, or crawl-level stop conditions.

competencies.statement: Propagate capacity from report and storage sinks through parsing, fetch, frontier, and discovery instead of buffering without bound.
misconceptions: Async iteration automatically supplies end-to-end backpressure.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Propagate capacity from report and storage sinks through parsing, fetch, frontier, and discovery instead of buffering without bound.

competencies.statement: Propagate cancellation into queued, fetching, parsing, browser, audit, writing, and retry operations and reject late results.
misconceptions: Aborting fetch cancels the complete work item.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Propagate cancellation into queued, fetching, parsing, browser, audit, writing, and retry operations and reject late results.

competencies.statement: Stop admission, abort permitted work, await settlements, flush durable state, close resources, and inspect live handles.
misconceptions: Calling process.exit is a graceful crawler shutdown.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Stop admission, abort permitted work, await settlements, flush durable state, close resources, and inspect live handles.

competencies.statement: Define which policy, seed, frontier, attempt, digest, report, and output states must survive and which can be recomputed.
misconceptions: Dumping every in-memory object is the safest checkpoint.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define which policy, seed, frontier, attempt, digest, report, and output states must survive and which can be recomputed.

competencies.statement: Write bounded versioned state to a temporary file, sync by declared durability, validate, rename atomically, and retain recovery copies.
misconceptions: One successful write call makes a durable checkpoint.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Write bounded versioned state to a temporary file, sync by declared durability, validate, rename atomically, and retain recovery copies.

competencies.statement: Return claimed or fetching items to an explicit retry state using attempt and idempotency rules after a crash.
misconceptions: In-flight work should be marked complete to avoid duplicates.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Return claimed or fetching items to an explicit retry state using attempt and idempotency rules after a crash.

competencies.statement: Reject or migrate checkpoints whose authorization, URL identity, schema, dependency, or crawl policy no longer matches.
misconceptions: Old checkpoints are safe whenever JSON.parse succeeds.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reject or migrate checkpoints whose authorization, URL identity, schema, dependency, or crawl policy no longer matches.

competencies.statement: Prove no lost terminal records, duplicate external effects, missing frontier items, or unexplained count changes across interruption.
misconceptions: A resumed process reaching the end proves correct recovery.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Prove no lost terminal records, duplicate external effects, missing frontier items, or unexplained count changes across interruption.

competencies.statement: Compute and label wire, decoded, DOM, main-content, record, and rendered digests for distinct questions.
misconceptions: One content hash answers identity at every stage.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Compute and label wire, decoded, DOM, main-content, record, and rendered digests for distinct questions.

competencies.statement: Separate URL aliases, byte-identical responses, equivalent admitted records, and replayed observations without deleting provenance.
misconceptions: Exact content duplicates have no independent audit value.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate URL aliases, byte-identical responses, equivalent admitted records, and replayed observations without deleting provenance.

competencies.statement: Use tokenization, boilerplate policy, thresholds, examples, and false-merge review for similarity decisions.
misconceptions: A similarity percentage objectively proves two pages are duplicates.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use tokenization, boilerplate policy, thresholds, examples, and false-merge review for similarity decisions.

competencies.statement: Classify metadata, template, content, accessibility, policy, redirect, disappearance, and parse changes with prior version evidence.
misconceptions: Any hash change means stakeholder content changed.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Classify metadata, template, content, accessibility, policy, redirect, disappearance, and parse changes with prior version evidence.

competencies.statement: Retain version lineage, supersession, disappearance, deletion, restoration, and report impact under retention policy.
misconceptions: Overwriting latest records is enough for audits and corrections.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Retain version lineage, supersession, disappearance, deletion, restoration, and report impact under retention policy.

competencies.statement: Audit title and description presence, uniqueness, length evidence, visible consistency, and stakeholder intent without ranking promises.
misconceptions: A fixed character count determines search quality.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Audit title and description presence, uniqueness, length evidence, visible consistency, and stakeholder intent without ranking promises.

competencies.statement: Resolve canonical links and reconcile redirects, sitemap URLs, internal links, content identity, and scope before reporting conflicts.
misconceptions: A canonical tag forces all consumers to merge pages.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Resolve canonical links and reconcile redirects, sitemap URLs, internal links, content identity, and scope before reporting conflicts.

competencies.statement: Parse robots meta and X-Robots-Tag directives by agent, precedence, response, and scope while keeping crawl and index policy distinct.
misconceptions: robots.txt and noindex are interchangeable controls.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Parse robots meta and X-Robots-Tag directives by agent, precedence, response, and scope while keeping crawl and index policy distinct.

competencies.statement: Validate language-region codes, self references, reciprocal alternates, canonical compatibility, reachability, and graph components.
misconceptions: Valid hreflang syntax proves localization relationships are correct.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Validate language-region codes, self references, reciprocal alternates, canonical compatibility, reachability, and graph components.

competencies.statement: Parse bounded JSON-LD as untrusted data, validate known shapes, preserve unknowns, and avoid eligibility or ranking claims.
misconceptions: Valid JSON syntax proves structured data meaning and search eligibility.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Parse bounded JSON-LD as untrusted data, validate known shapes, preserve unknowns, and avoid eligibility or ranking claims.

competencies.statement: Classify informative, decorative, functional, linked, complex, grouped, and text images using context and route uncertain cases to review.
misconceptions: Every image needs non-empty alt text.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Classify informative, decorative, functional, linked, complex, grouped, and text images using context and route uncertain cases to review.

competencies.statement: Audit page language, heading outline evidence, landmark purpose, labels, table relationships, and duplicate identifiers without enforcing cosmetic templates.
misconceptions: Every page must use exactly one h1 followed by every heading level.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Audit page language, heading outline evidence, landmark purpose, labels, table relationships, and duplicate identifiers without enforcing cosmetic templates.

competencies.statement: Identify native control and relationship evidence while acknowledging accessible names and states can depend on computed browser semantics.
misconceptions: Static attributes fully determine every accessible name and role.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Identify native control and relationship evidence while acknowledging accessible names and states can depend on computed browser semantics.

competencies.statement: Report code-level risks for keyboard traps, focus, motion, timing, targets, and status while requiring interaction evidence.
misconceptions: A source scan can prove keyboard and reduced-motion behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Report code-level risks for keyboard traps, focus, motion, timing, targets, and status while requiring interaction evidence.

competencies.statement: Map findings to WCAG 2.2 criteria, page states, severity rationale, affected users, and human verification without claiming automated conformance.
misconceptions: Zero static findings means the site conforms to WCAG.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Map findings to WCAG 2.2 criteria, page states, severity rationale, affected users, and human verification without claiming automated conformance.

competencies.statement: Run axe-core with declared version, rules, tags, inclusions, exclusions, page state, and complete result evidence.
misconceptions: axe defaults and one URL represent the complete site.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Run axe-core with declared version, rules, tags, inclusions, exclusions, page state, and complete result evidence.

competencies.statement: Scan initial, navigation, dialog, form error, authenticated, loading, empty, and changed responsive states reached through user actions.
misconceptions: Accessibility defects only exist in initial DOM state.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Scan initial, navigation, dialog, form error, authenticated, loading, empty, and changed responsive states reached through user actions.

competencies.statement: Preserve rule, impact, targets, HTML snippet digest, help, occurrence grouping, false-positive review, owner, and retest evidence.
misconceptions: Every automated violation should be accepted or suppressed without review.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Preserve rule, impact, targets, HTML snippet digest, help, occurrence grouping, false-positive review, owner, and retest evidence.

competencies.statement: Add keyboard-only, focus order and visibility, zoom and reflow, screen-reader, motion, contrast, target, and cognitive review.
misconceptions: Automated accessibility tools detect all WCAG failures.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Add keyboard-only, focus order and visibility, zoom and reflow, screen-reader, motion, contrast, target, and cognitive review.

competencies.statement: Version fixtures and state journeys, compare resolved and new findings, and prevent baselines from hiding regressions.
misconceptions: Snapshotting a violation count is a sufficient regression test.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Version fixtures and state journeys, compare resolved and new findings, and prevent baselines from hiding regressions.

competencies.statement: Inventory document, script, style, image, font, media, preload, module, and third-party references with initiator and scope evidence.
misconceptions: The HTML page byte count represents total page weight.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Inventory document, script, style, image, font, media, preload, module, and third-party references with initiator and scope evidence.

competencies.statement: Separate encoded transfer, decoded body, in-memory, intrinsic media, and rendered dimensions.
misconceptions: Content-Length is the actual user memory and rendering cost.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate encoded transfer, decoded body, in-memory, intrinsic media, and rendered dimensions.

competencies.statement: Record cache headers, validators, redirects, protocol, compression, connection context, and cold or warm assumptions.
misconceptions: One local fetch duration measures production user experience.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record cache headers, validators, redirects, protocol, compression, connection context, and cold or warm assumptions.

competencies.statement: Set stakeholder-approved count, byte, third-party, font, image, script, browser-time, and uncertainty budgets with exceptions.
misconceptions: Universal page-weight thresholds fit every user task.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Set stakeholder-approved count, byte, third-party, font, image, script, browser-time, and uncertainty budgets with exceptions.

competencies.statement: Separate static resource evidence, controlled browser lab evidence, real-user field data, accessibility impact, and production conclusions.
misconceptions: Crawler timing can replace browser metrics and field data.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate static resource evidence, controlled browser lab evidence, real-user field data, accessibility impact, and production conclusions.

competencies.statement: Render only when static evidence cannot satisfy an authorized stakeholder requirement and retain the decision cause.
misconceptions: JavaScript presence means every page requires a browser.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Render only when static evidence cannot satisfy an authorized stakeholder requirement and retain the decision cause.

competencies.statement: Create bounded incognito-like BrowserContexts with explicit storage, permission, download, service-worker, locale, viewport, and close policy.
misconceptions: Opening a new Page fully isolates cookies, cache, permissions, and workers.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Create bounded incognito-like BrowserContexts with explicit storage, permission, download, service-worker, locale, viewport, and close policy.

competencies.statement: Wait for application-specific stable evidence under time and request budgets instead of treating network idle as universal readiness.
misconceptions: networkidle means every dynamic application is complete.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Wait for application-specific stable evidence under time and request budgets instead of treating network idle as universal readiness.

competencies.statement: Reapply origin, request type, redirect, download, WebSocket, worker, and SSRF rules to browser-initiated traffic.
misconceptions: Validating the navigation URL controls all subresource requests.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reapply origin, request type, redirect, download, WebSocket, worker, and SSRF rules to browser-initiated traffic.

competencies.statement: Bind browser version, context policy, viewport, actions, DOM digest, screenshot or trace identity, console errors, and closure evidence.
misconceptions: Rendered HTML alone explains the browser state that produced it.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Bind browser version, context policy, viewport, actions, DOM digest, screenshot or trace identity, console errors, and closure evidence.

competencies.statement: Require explicit owner and account authorization, purpose, role, environment, page scope, time window, and revocation for authenticated access.
misconceptions: Valid credentials authorize every action available to the account.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Require explicit owner and account authorization, purpose, role, environment, page scope, time window, and revocation for authenticated access.

competencies.statement: Acquire secrets through approved channels, avoid source and logs, scope them minimally, rotate exposure, and destroy temporary material.
misconceptions: Environment variables make secrets inherently safe.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Acquire secrets through approved channels, avoid source and logs, scope them minimally, rotate exposure, and destroy temporary material.

competencies.statement: Permit safe retrieval only, block state-changing forms and logout or destructive routes, and test same-site side effects.
misconceptions: GET requests can never change server state.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Permit safe retrieval only, block state-changing forms and logout or destructive routes, and test same-site side effects.

competencies.statement: Partition cookies, storage, caches, checkpoints, reports, and browser contexts by owner, tenant, account, purpose, and run.
misconceptions: Different targets can share one authenticated browser context for efficiency.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Partition cookies, storage, caches, checkpoints, reports, and browser contexts by owner, tenant, account, purpose, and run.

competencies.statement: Minimize, redact, encrypt where required, restrict access, expire, delete, and audit sensitive content through every derived artifact.
misconceptions: Redacting final CSV removes sensitive values from all intermediate state.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Minimize, redact, encrypt where required, restrict access, expire, delete, and audit sensitive content through every derived artifact.

competencies.statement: Render findings through text-safe sinks or context-specific encoding and narrowly reviewed sanitization.
misconceptions: Escaping HTML once makes content safe in every output context.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Render findings through text-safe sinks or context-specific encoding and narrowly reviewed sanitization.

competencies.statement: Preserve data while neutralizing spreadsheet formula triggers under an explicit export and consumer contract.
misconceptions: Quoting CSV fields prevents spreadsheet formula execution.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Preserve data while neutralizing spreadsheet formula triggers under an explicit export and consumer contract.

competencies.statement: Generate owned filenames, confine paths, reject traversal and unsafe archive entries, and handle collisions and Unicode deliberately.
misconceptions: Removing ../ makes an untrusted path safe.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Generate owned filenames, confine paths, reject traversal and unsafe archive entries, and handle collisions and Unicode deliberately.

competencies.statement: Structure logs, bound and encode untrusted values, remove control sequences, redact secrets, and prevent log-shape injection.
misconceptions: JSON.stringify alone makes logs and terminals safe.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Structure logs, bound and encode untrusted values, remove control sequences, redact secrets, and prevent log-shape injection.

competencies.statement: Give parsers and plugins typed bounded inputs, no ambient secrets or network, deadlines, output validation, versioning, and kill boundaries.
misconceptions: npm package sandboxing protects the host by default.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Give parsers and plugins typed bounded inputs, no ambient secrets or network, deadlines, output validation, versioning, and kill boundaries.

competencies.statement: Version JSON Lines records, encoding, ordering, missingness, provenance, error rows, and digest manifest for streaming consumers.
misconceptions: One JSON object per line is self-documenting and interoperable.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Version JSON Lines records, encoding, ordering, missingness, provenance, error rows, and digest manifest for streaming consumers.

competencies.statement: Define headers, delimiters, newline, quoting, Unicode, formula defense, nulls, row limits, and round-trip fixtures with csv-stringify.
misconceptions: CSV has one universal dialect and missing-value representation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define headers, delimiters, newline, quoting, Unicode, formula defense, nulls, row limits, and round-trip fixtures with csv-stringify.

competencies.statement: Provide landmarks, headings, summaries, sortable-table alternatives, keyboard controls, focus, reflow, status, print, and non-color severity.
misconceptions: A semantic table alone makes any large report accessible.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Provide landmarks, headings, summaries, sortable-table alternatives, keyboard controls, focus, reflow, status, print, and non-color severity.

competencies.statement: Pair charts and relationship views with structured tables, descriptions, filters, units, scales, and source links.
misconceptions: An aria-label containing chart title is a complete text alternative.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Pair charts and relationship views with structured tables, descriptions, filters, units, scales, and source links.

competencies.statement: Link findings to evidence, owner, status, decision, suppression expiry, retest, changed version, and stakeholder-readable resolution.
misconceptions: Deleting a report row is a valid correction history.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Link findings to evidence, owner, status, decision, suppression expiry, retest, changed version, and stakeholder-readable resolution.

competencies.statement: Build original accepted, malformed, adversarial, boundary, changed, Unicode, duplicate, inaccessible, and privacy-sensitive fixtures with provenance.
misconceptions: One representative HTML fixture covers parser and crawler behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Build original accepted, malformed, adversarial, boundary, changed, Unicode, duplicate, inaccessible, and privacy-sensitive fixtures with provenance.

competencies.statement: Test URL, robots, sitemap, state, scheduling, extraction, dedup, report, and recovery invariants with deterministic clocks and schedules.
misconceptions: Only end-to-end browser tests reveal meaningful defects.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test URL, robots, sitemap, state, scheduling, extraction, dedup, report, and recovery invariants with deterministic clocks and schedules.

competencies.statement: Use expected TypeScript errors to prove invalid state, unsafe narrowing, mutable values, and missing exhaustive cases are rejected.
misconceptions: Passing runtime tests proves the type boundary is useful.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use expected TypeScript errors to prove invalid state, unsafe narrowing, mutable values, and missing exhaustive cases are rejected.

competencies.statement: Use loopback servers and adapters for redirects, truncation, encoding, delay, disconnect, compression, retry, cancellation, and shutdown faults.
misconceptions: Mocked fetch responses prove Node network lifecycle behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use loopback servers and adapters for redirects, truncation, encoding, delay, disconnect, compression, retry, cancellation, and shutdown faults.

competencies.statement: Seed defects in scope, robots, byte limits, selector cardinality, visited timing, abort, report escaping, and recovery and require tests to fail.
misconceptions: High statement coverage proves tests detect harmful changes.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Seed defects in scope, robots, byte limits, selector cardinality, visited timing, abort, report escaping, and recovery and require tests to fail.

competencies.statement: Correlate run, policy, URL, attempt, redirect, response, parse, frontier, browser, audit, export, and recovery events without logging content secrets.
misconceptions: A timestamp and URL in console.log are sufficient causal evidence.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Correlate run, policy, URL, attempt, redirect, response, parse, frontier, browser, audit, export, and recovery events without logging content secrets.

competencies.statement: Define low-cardinality request, byte, queue, age, error, rejection, browser, report, and budget metrics with units and labels.
misconceptions: Using raw URLs as metric labels helps debugging without cost.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define low-cardinality request, byte, queue, age, error, rejection, browser, report, and budget metrics with units and labels.

competencies.statement: Measure event-loop delay, CPU, heap, streams, sockets, browser contexts, queue age, throughput, and origin fairness under representative fixtures.
misconceptions: High concurrency always increases useful throughput.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Measure event-loop delay, CPU, heap, streams, sockets, browser contexts, queue age, throughput, and origin fairness under representative fixtures.

competencies.statement: Use one durable schedule owner, overlap exclusion, missed-run policy, owner pause, configuration identity, and shutdown evidence.
misconceptions: setInterval is a durable production scheduler.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use one durable schedule owner, overlap exclusion, missed-run policy, owner pause, configuration identity, and shutdown evidence.

competencies.statement: Define startup, pause, incident, partial output, retention, deletion, correction, restart, rollback, and escalation procedures with owners.
misconceptions: Logs and reports should be retained indefinitely for debugging.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define startup, pause, incident, partial output, retention, deletion, correction, restart, rollback, and escalation procedures with owners.

competencies.statement: Review direct purpose, transitive graph, lifecycle scripts, integrity, provenance, licenses, advisories, reachability, and upgrade ownership.
misconceptions: npm audit output alone proves dependency safety.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Review direct purpose, transitive graph, lifecycle scripts, integrity, provenance, licenses, advisories, reachability, and upgrade ownership.

competencies.statement: Bind Playwright package, browser revision, download source, digest, platform libraries, sandbox policy, and patch process.
misconceptions: Pinning the Playwright npm package pins every browser artifact automatically.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Bind Playwright package, browser revision, download source, digest, platform libraries, sandbox policy, and patch process.

competencies.statement: Inspect packed files, exports, declarations, source maps, licenses, fixtures, secrets, generated files, and emitted smoke before publish.
misconceptions: A successful npm pack means package contents are correct.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Inspect packed files, exports, declarations, source maps, licenses, fixtures, secrets, generated files, and emitted smoke before publish.

competencies.statement: Use pinned multi-stage images, non-root user, read-only runtime where possible, explicit browser dependencies, limits, signals, and inspected contents.
misconceptions: Containers sandbox untrusted pages and plugins by default.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use pinned multi-stage images, non-root user, read-only runtime where possible, explicit browser dependencies, limits, signals, and inspected contents.

competencies.statement: Promote one immutable artifact through canary scopes, compare correctness and resource evidence, pause automatically, and rehearse rollback.
misconceptions: Rebuilding from the same commit produces the same approved release.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Promote one immutable artifact through canary scopes, compare correctness and resource evidence, pause automatically, and rehearse rollback.

competencies.statement: Classify policies, authorization records, checkpoints, extracted data, reports, corrections, secrets, and logs by RPO, RTO, retention, and restore order.
misconceptions: Backing up output reports is enough to resume and audit a crawl.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Classify policies, authorization records, checkpoints, extracted data, reports, corrections, secrets, and logs by RPO, RTO, retention, and restore order.

competencies.statement: Restore into isolation, validate versions and digests, reconcile frontier and records, rotate secrets, and prove safe resume without contacting targets.
misconceptions: A backup command exit code proves restorable state.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Restore into isolation, validate versions and digests, reconcile frontier and records, rotate secrets, and prove safe resume without contacting targets.

competencies.statement: Rehearse owner revoke, runaway space, private-address redirect, secret leak, bad selector, accessibility regression, corrupt checkpoint, browser leak, and unsafe export.
misconceptions: Rollback alone handles crawler security, privacy, and data incidents.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Rehearse owner revoke, runaway space, private-address redirect, secret leak, bad selector, accessibility regression, corrupt checkpoint, browser leak, and unsafe export.

competencies.statement: Require source-to-emission, clean install, types, lint, tests, mutations, local faults, browser, accessibility, security, capacity, package, container, restore, and rollback evidence.
misconceptions: Passing compiler and unit tests is sufficient release evidence.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Require source-to-emission, clean install, types, lint, tests, mutations, local faults, browser, accessibility, security, capacity, package, container, restore, and rollback evidence.

competencies.statement: Defend unfamiliar authorized cases, state non-claims, assign every accepted risk an owner and expiry, and preserve stakeholder sign-off.
misconceptions: A polished demonstration eliminates need for residual-risk ownership.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend unfamiliar authorized cases, state non-claims, assign every accepted risk an owner and expiry, and preserve stakeholder sign-off.

credential.title: Build and Ship an Authorized Web Crawler and Accessible Site Auditor in TypeScript 7 and Node 24 Certificate
